name: 1414 Degrees Limited
analysis: 14D's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 45% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0910, stop A$0.0634, target A$0.1650 (2.68:1) — then trail it.
